name: Sauna of the DEAD
short_description: Heatwave Master, bring order to underworld's sauna. FEEL the exhilarating chaos of Heatwave Mastery!
detailed_description:
Sauna of the DEAD is an action RPG where you become a heatwave master in Japanese-style sauna, swinging your towel to blast hot air at zombies and demons in the underworld's saunas to defeat them.

Retro-style pixel art!

The saunas of the underworld are, surprisingly, Japanese-style!

Note: Settings for playing on STEAM DECK

Playing on a STEAM DECK, please follow these steps:

Properties > Compatibility > Force the use of a specific Steam Play compatibility tool > Select "Proton Experimental"

Story

As a heatwave master, you were lured by a suspicious man to work in the underworld's saunas.

Over a 7-day stay in the underworld, defeat many zombies and demons to aim for a showdown with the Demon King Vihta.

Gameplay

- Swing your towel to hurl hot air at zombies and demons.

- Use different towel swinging techniques to defeat many zombies and demons.

- Collect Totonoi orbs to power up through Sauna > Cold Bath > Lounging Rest.

- Receive rewards based on the number of defeats, and power up with sauna goods and drinks.

Play Time

4 to 10 hours

Endgame Content
By exploring Sauna Fairytale or aiming for a high rank in Endless Summer, you can enjoy even more gameplay.

🔥 Saunas: 3 Facilities

  • Zombie Hot Spring

  • Spa Love

  • Great Hell Sauna

💀 Survival Sauna: 1 Facility

  • Sauna Endless Summer

✨ Exploration Sauna: 1 Facility

  • Sauna Fairytale

Sauna terminology

- Aufguss involves swinging a towel in the sauna to generate hot air and directing that hot air towards the sauna's patrons.

- Loyly refers to the act of pouring water on hot stones in the sauna to create steam and increase the sauna's temperature.

- In this game, "to be put in order" means to achieve a state of mindfulness and emptiness by repeatedly going through the cycle of Sauna > Cold Bath > Rest.

Video Streaming Guidelines

Streaming is permitted for both individuals and corporations without the need for permission.

Monetization is only allowed using the functions provided by the video streaming sites.

We appreciate including the game's name in the title of the video or stream and linking to the Steam page in the description.

We take no responsibility for any damages incurred by streaming this game.

The contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
